response.title: Lead Financial Analyst
response.description: Global Finance Solutions Inc. is seeking a Lead Financial Analyst to join our dynamic finance team. The ideal candidate will utilize their extensive experience and analytical skills to drive strategic financial planning, budgeting, and forecasting processes. As a lead, you will oversee junior analysts, collaborate with cross-functional teams, and provide insights that will influence key business decisions.

required_skills: 5+ years of experience in financial analysis and reporting
Proficiency in financial modeling using Excel and other analytical tools
Strong knowledge of GAAP and IFRS accounting principles
Experience with ERP systems (e.g., SAP, Oracle)
Ability to create and interpret complex financial statements and reports
Expertise in budget preparation and variance analysis
Strong analytical and quantitative skills with a focus on data-driven decision making
Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal
preferred_skills: Experience with data visualization tools (e.g., Tableau, Power BI)
Familiarity with corporate finance and investment analysis
Knowledge of regulatory compliance in the finance sector
Leadership experience in managing teams or projects
requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, or related field (MBA preferred)
